title: Selling Courses from Pakistan Without Stripe: Which Option Actually Works for You — The Full Guide
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: If you're a digital creator in Pakistan looking to sell courses without relying on Stripe, you're not alone. Many creators in restricted countries face similar challenges. PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip often exclude certain countries due to banking limitations, KYC requirements, or other restrictions. This leaves digital sellers with limited options for processing payments and delivering their products. In this guide, we'll explore the alternatives and help you find a solution that works for you.
What Each Option Actually Offers

Gumroad, for instance, blocks countries based on Stripe's decision, while PayPal restricts access to certain regions due to banking and regulatory reasons. Stripe itself has a long list of unsupported countries, including Pakistan. This leaves digital creators with limited options for platform-based solutions. On the other hand, NOWPayments, a crypto-native payment processor, offers a global payment solution, allowing creators to receive transactions from anywhere in the world without the need for a KYC account.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

When it comes to handling restricted countries, NOWPayments stands out. It doesn't rely on traditional payment processors like Stripe or PayPal, which means it doesn't inherit their country restrictions. With NOWPayments, you can sell digital products to customers from restricted countries without worrying about payment processing issues. This makes it an attractive option for creators in countries like Pakistan, Nigeria, and Ghana, who are often excluded from platform-based solutions.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

The crypto payment alternative is not a workaround — it is a structurally different approach to commerce. NOWPayments operates as a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins including Bitcoin, Ethereum, USDT on multiple chains, Solana, and Tron. Transactions settle directly to a wallet you control. There is no platform holding period, no payout schedule, and no compliance department deciding whether your country is permitted to receive funds. The Core Shop Engine integrates with NOWPayments via webhook, which means every confirmed transaction automatically triggers delivery — no manual steps, no delays, no dependency on a platform that can suspend your access.
Traditional payment processors often exclude countries due to banking limitations or KYC requirements.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

The risk of platform dependency is asymmetric in a specific way that most creators underestimate. When PayPal or Stripe is working, everything seems fine. When it stops working — through suspension, policy change, or geographic restriction enforcement — you lose access to your revenue channel instantly, often with funds already inside the platform that you cannot withdraw. Rebuilding on a new platform takes weeks. The income gap during that period is real money lost. Crypto-native infrastructure removes this asymmetric risk. Your wallet cannot be suspended. Your GitHub Pages store cannot be taken down by a payment platform's compliance team. The infrastructure is under your control from day one, which means no single external decision can cut off your income.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

So, which option is best for you? If you're looking for a platform-based solution, you may want to consider Gumroad or Payhip, but be aware of the country restrictions. If you're willing to explore alternative payment processors, NOWPayments is a great option. For a complete store infrastructure solution, consider the Full Stack Bundle, which includes everything you need to get started with NOWPayments and more.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The direct answer is NOWPayments combined with the Core Shop Engine. NOWPayments is a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins and sends a webhook to your backend when a payment confirms on-chain. The Core Shop Engine receives that webhook, verifies the transaction, generates a receipt, and delivers the product automatically. The key difference between this and a platform workaround is that it is not a workaround — it is a different infrastructure layer entirely. There is no platform that can suspend your access, no compliance team that can flag your account, and no payout schedule that delays your revenue. Your funds go directly to a wallet you control the moment a transaction confirms.
NOWPayments offers a global payment solution without the need for a KYC account.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're a creator in a restricted country looking to sell digital products, you may also be interested in other solutions like the Full Stack Bundle, which provides a complete store infrastructure, including payment processing and delivery capabilities, without the need for a traditional payment processor. Check out our shop at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html for more information.
Your Action Checklist

To get started with selling digital products without Stripe in Pakistan, follow these steps: Create an account on NOWPayments and set up your payment processor. Set up your store using the Full Stack Bundle and configure automated delivery and payment verification. Ensure that your digital product is ready for delivery and test the payment processing system. Promote your digital product to your target audience and start selling! Make sure to keep your customers informed about delivery and payment processing through regular updates and communication.
